top_k_candidates.ra_text: RA component: IoTIM. Definition: Acts as an integration layer for sensors, actuators, devices, and applications. It receives data from devices, processes it, and forwards it to applications, enabling interoperability and unified management.. Tag: raelements. Incoming connectors: Application–IoTIM Communication. Outgoing connectors: IoTIM–Gateway Communication, Device–IoTIM Communication.
